finding_results.notes: Replaced dual claims/missing-data checklists with one concise evidence log and embedded multiple concrete embodied consequences tied to the Tomas revelation (somatic surge, intrusive memory, self-indictment, stress response during preservation action).

Differentiated the three beats: initial call triages allegation credibility and confrontation boundaries; note capture freezes a contemporaneous evidence log plus personal stake; follow-up call now selects one verbatim line and one actionable lead, adding a memory-control decision rather than repeating the same data absence list.

Added immediate same-night high-risk action after legal hold: Marisol makes and sends mirror copies of raw audio despite explicit employment/legal exposure, then returns to sponsor logistics and light banter only after enacted consequence.

summary: Implemented focused structural/craft revisions in chapter_02 to resolve procedural drift and momentum stall in the post-meeting sequence, sharpen embodied consequence around the Tomas rupture, and insert a concrete same-night legal/exposure-risk action before tonal decompression while preserving continuity, voice, and chapter boundary constraints.
